seo.title: One-Click Nine-Grid Shot Breakdown – AI Cinematic Storyboard | OpenCreator
seo.description: Generate professional 3×3 cinematic storyboard grids from a single image. AI creates 9 unique camera angles including wide shots, close-ups, and detail shots.

hero.title: One-Click Nine-Grid Shot Breakdown
hero.description: Transform any image into a professional 3×3 cinematic storyboard grid. AI analyzes your subject and generates 9 unique camera angles—from establishing wide shots to extreme close-ups—maintaining consistent lighting, costume, and character across all frames. Perfect for filmmakers, content creators, and brand advertisers.

steps.title: Upload your reference image
steps.description: Provide a single image with your subject (person, group, or object). Nano Banana Pro analyzes the composition, key subjects, and their spatial relationships.

steps.title: AI generates cinematic grid
steps.description: The workflow creates a 3×3 storyboard with 9 professional camera angles: Row 1 (establishing shots), Row 2 (core coverage), Row 3 (details & angles).

steps.title: Consistent visual style
steps.description: All 9 frames maintain unified lighting, costume, color grading, and subject identity—ready for film production or brand campaigns.

steps.title: Export high-resolution grid
steps.description: Download the complete storyboard grid in 2:3 aspect ratio, optimized for professional film and advertising workflows.

items.question: What is the Nine-Grid Shot Breakdown workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow transforms a single reference image into a professional 3×3 cinematic storyboard grid. It generates 9 unique camera angles including extreme long shots, medium shots, close-ups, and detail shots—all maintaining consistent visual style.

items.question: What camera angles are included in the grid?
items.answer: The grid follows professional cinematography standards: Row 1 has establishing shots (extreme long shot, long shot, medium long shot), Row 2 covers core angles (medium shot waist-up, medium shot waist-down, close-up), Row 3 provides details (extreme close-up, low angle, back view).

items.question: Does it work with groups or just single subjects?
items.answer: The workflow adapts to any subject type—single person, couples, groups, or objects. It analyzes the spatial relationships and interaction patterns to create appropriate compositions for each shot type.

items.question: What AI model powers this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for image-to-image generation, creating each of the 9 frames while maintaining consistent lighting, costume, and character identity across the entire storyboard grid.

items.question: What aspect ratio is the output?
items.answer: Each frame in the grid uses a 2:3 aspect ratio, which is standard for cinematic storyboards. The complete grid is rendered at 4K resolution for professional use.

items.question: Can I use this for commercial projects?
items.answer: Yes, the generated storyboards can be used for commercial film productions, brand campaigns, advertising pitches, and client presentations.

items.question: How does it maintain consistency across frames?
items.answer: The workflow ensures all 9 frames share unified lighting direction, costume details, color grading, and subject identity. This is achieved through Nano Banana Pro's advanced image understanding capabilities.

items.question: What input do I need to provide?
items.answer: You only need to upload a single reference image. The workflow includes a detailed prompt template that guides the AI to generate all 9 cinematic angles automatically.
